mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", tech_id AS "techId", tech_name AS "techName", suggest_type AS "suggestType", suggest_reason AS "suggestReason", priority AS "priority", is_adopted AS "isAdopted" FROM ai_exam_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY priority ASC, id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", disease_id AS "diseaseId", disease_name AS "diseaseName", recommend_icd AS "recommendIcd", probability AS "probability", risk_level AS "riskLevel", treatment_direction AS "treatmentDirection", diagnosis_basis AS "diagnosisBasis", is_adopted AS "isAdopted", sort_order AS "sortOrder" FROM ai_diagnosis_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, probability DESC NULLS LAST
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_exam_suggestion (register_id, tech_id, tech_name, suggest_type, suggest_reason, priority, model_id) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{techId}, #{techName}, #{suggestType}, #{suggestReason}, #{priority}, #{modelId})
mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", analysis_type AS "analysisType", original_result AS "originalResult", abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", risk_level AS "riskLevel", analysis_report AS "analysisReport", correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM ai_exam_analysis WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY analysis_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", drug_id AS "drugId", drug_name AS "drugName", recommend_usage AS "recommendUsage", recommend_quantity AS "recommendQuantity", confidence AS "confidence", recommendation_basis AS "recommendationBasis", caution_notes AS "cautionNotes", is_adopted AS "isAdopted", sort_order AS "sortOrder", model_id AS "modelId", creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM ai_drug_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, confidence DESC NULLS LAST
